name: audit-pack-emit bundle_id field follows the commit-sha-utc-timestamp pattern from §2.24
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format json --commit-sha cafef00d --generated-at 2026-05-25T12:30:00Z --out-dir out 2>err.txt && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/cafef00d-2026-05-25T12:30:00Z/bundle.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.bundle_id==="cafef00d-2026-05-25T12:30:00Z"?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
